creator: ml@netfence.it
text:
(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #23)

I'm running 14.2 on a StarLite laptop and I'm still seeing these messages.
"compat.linuxkpi.i915_disable_power_well=0" doesn't make them go away.

These come up even if I'm not using the audio subsystem (i.e. I'm not playing anything).
I'm not yet sure if this is just a cosmetic thing or if there are consequences, though.
